settings.heading: Kevin® simulates people at home—so you can leave calmly.
settings.lede: Swiss-engineered presence simulation: light scenarios, moving shadows, and everyday sounds. Plug in near a visible window, set schedules or geo-fencing in the app, and let believable occupancy run from local storage.
settings.image_alt: Kevin® device — side profile product photo
settings.cta_subheading: Pick your color and continue to secure Shopify checkout.

settings.heading: Plug in. Schedule. Leave with peace of mind.
settings.body: Setup takes about 60 seconds. No installation, no wiring, no monitoring panel.

settings.title: Plug & play
settings.body: Place Kevin near a visible window with a wall or ceiling for shadows. Connect the included power cable (approx. 3 m)—typical use around 9 watts.

settings.title: Schedule or geo-fence
settings.body: Tell Kevin when to simulate presence—or let geo-fencing activate automatically the moment you leave, even for a short walk or coffee run.

settings.title: Stay believable
settings.body: Light, shadow, and sound play from local storage—not streamed from the cloud. Jammer-resilient protection when Wi-Fi security fails.

settings.heading: Built for how you actually leave home.
settings.body: Whether you commute, travel, or manage multiple properties—Kevin adapts to your routine.

settings.image_alt: Activate Kevin via the app on your way to work
settings.title: Heading to work
settings.body: Activate Kevin via the app on your way out. While you focus on your day, Kevin makes it look like you are still at home.

settings.image_alt: Schedule Kevin for holidays and weekend trips
settings.title: Weekends and holidays
settings.body: Schedule simulations in advance for getaways. Your home looks lived-in and cared for—even from thousands of miles away.

settings.image_alt: Manage multiple Kevin devices in one app
settings.title: Multiple properties
settings.body: Own several homes, a vacation rental, or business sites? Add a Kevin to each location and manage them all in one app.

settings.heading: Prevention beats reaction.
settings.body: Burglars avoid homes that look and sound lived-in. Most break-ins are opportunistic—they target places that appear empty, often in daylight, and take only minutes. A believable presence removes the easy opportunity.

settings.title: Works in homes, offices, and shops
settings.body: Kevin simulates presence in apartments, houses, offices, shops, and warehouses. Place near a window or visible area, configure in the Kevin app, and let believable occupancy run from local storage.
